Sql · Migrated Article

数据库

数据库学习，看了海洛的总结文档，并结合自己过往的实操，记录总结

DATE · 2024-09-26 TAGS · Sql, Base SOURCE · old blog
TL;DR
数据库学习，看了海洛的总结文档，并结合自己过往的实操，记录总结

01关系型数据库

特点

  1. 数据以表格的形式出现
  2. 每⾏为各种记录名称
  3. 每列为记录名称所对应的数据域
  4. 许多的⾏和列组成⼀张表单
  5. 若⼲的表单组成database

相关概念

  • 主键：主键是一个或多个字段的组合，用于在一个表中唯一标识每一条记录。主键的值必须唯一，不能为 NULL。
  • 外键：外键是一个字段或字段组合，它在一个表中，引用另一个表的主键或唯一键（Unique Key），用于建立两个表之间的关系。

02SQL语⾔简单学习

创建数据表

CREATE TABLE users (
-- NOT NULL 表示这个字段不能接受 NULL 值。AUTO_INCREMENT 表示每当新记录被插入时，这个字段的值会自动递增 常用在主键中。
id INT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
--  VARCHAR(50)，意味着它可以存储最多 50 个字符的字符串
username VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
email VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
-- DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP 在插入新记录时，如果没有为这个字段提供值，它将默认为当前的日期和时间
ctime DATETIME NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
-- tinyint(1) 通常用于存储布尔值（0 或 1）
is_deleted tinyint(1) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
-- 指定主键
PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
-- 创建唯一索引username_key 在username字段上，username字段值必须是唯一的 ，索引主要是用来加速查询 在WHERE、ORDER BY 和 JOIN
UNIQUE INDEX `username_key`(`username`)
) DEFAULT CHARACTER SET utf8mb4 COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci; -- 默认字符集utf8mb4（广泛使用 支持表情）
-- COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci校对规则 这个规则ci表示了大小写不敏感 在查询时 WHERE name = 'Apple' 等价查apple

查询

-- 简单查询
select * from users where is_deleted=0 and username='hailuo';
-- 模糊搜索 like模糊 limit限制 order by排序
select * from users where is_deleted=0 and username like
'hai%' limit 50 order by id asc;
-- 分组聚合 分组查询一般分组和SELECT查询的字段同时存在，其他SELECT聚合形式作为属性
SELECT customer_id, SUM(order_amount) AS total_amount
FROM orders
GROUP BY customer_id;
-- join
SELECT o.order_id, c.customer_name
FROM orders AS o
INNER JOIN customers AS c ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id;

JOIN

JOIN 子句用于将两个或多个表合并成一个结果集，这是基于一个共同的字段（或字段）之间的关联。这种共同的字段称为键，通常是主键和外键

  • INNER JOIN（内连接）：只返回两个表中匹配的行。
  • LEFT JOIN（左连接）：
  • 定义：LEFT JOIN 返回左表（即 JOIN 子句中的第一个表）的所有记录，无论右表（即 JOIN 子句中的第二个表）中是否存在匹配的记录。
  • 结果集：如果右表中有匹配的记录，那么结果集中将包含匹配的行；如果右表中没有匹配的记录，结果集中左表的记录仍然会显示，但右表对应的列将返回 NULL。
  • 使用场景：当你想要从左表中选择所有记录，并且只对右表中匹配的记录感兴趣时使用。
SELECT employees.name, departments.department_name
FROM employees
LEFT JOIN departments ON employees.department_id = departments.id;

这条语句将返回所有员工的列表，即使某些员工没有分配到任何部门，他们的 department_name 会显示为 NULL。

  • RIGHT JOIN（右连接）：
  • 定义：RIGHT JOIN 返回右表（即 JOIN 子句中的第一个表）的所有记录，无论左表（即 JOIN 子句中的第二个表）中是否存在匹配的记录。
  • 结果集：如果左表中有匹配的记录，那么结果集中将包含匹配的行；如果左表中没有匹配的记录，结果集中右表的记录仍然会显示，但左表对应的列将返回 NULL。
  • 使用场景：当你想要从右表中选择所有记录，并且只对左表中匹配的记录感兴趣时使用。
SELECT employees.name, departments.department_name
FROM departments
RIGHT JOIN employees ON employees.department_id = departments.id;

departments这个表的所有行，employees没匹配到的employees.name为null

  • FULL JOIN（全连接）：返回两个表中所有行，无论它们是否匹配。如果某一侧没有匹配，结果中该侧的字段将为 NULL。
  • CROSS JOIN（交叉连接）：返回两个表的笛卡尔积，每个表中的每一行都会与另一个表中的每一行组合。

03祖传sql


SELECT
  group_id,
  count(1) as pv,
  count(DISTINCT splited_flow_id) as uv
FROM
  iceberg_bdp.dwb_flow_abtest_group_split_l_1d_d
WHERE
  log_date = '20221127'
  and expr_id = 5267
  and splited_flow_id in (
    select
      DISTINCT buvid
    from
      b_dwd.dwd_flow_ubt_web_event_detail_l_d
    where
      log_date = '20221127'
      and event_id = '333.1121.shouyeab.show'
      and extended_fields ['chosen_list_ver'] = 1
  )
GROUP BY
  group_id



with alluser as(SELECT extended_fields['buvid'] personbuvid,
SUM(CAST(extended_fields ['duration'] as double)) persondayduration,
extended_fields['platform'] platform,
event_id
from b_dwd.dwd_flow_ubt_web_event_detail_l_d
where log_date = '20230130' and event_id = '333.1121.pageshow.duration'
and (
    (extended_fields['build']>'68200000' and extended_fields['appid'] = '1' and extended_fields['platform'] = 'ios')
or  (extended_fields['build']>'6850000' and extended_fields['appid'] = '1' and extended_fields['platform'] = 'android')
  )

group by extended_fields['buvid'],event_id,extended_fields['platform']
)

SELECT percentile_approx(CAST(persondayduration as double), 0.4) as m40,
percentile_approx(CAST(persondayduration as double), 0.5) as m50,
percentile_approx(CAST(persondayduration as double), 0.6) as m60,
percentile_approx(CAST(persondayduration as double), 0.7) as m70,
percentile_approx(CAST(persondayduration as double), 0.8) as m80,
percentile_approx(CAST(persondayduration as double), 0.9) as m90,
count(personbuvid) as uv,
event_id,
platform
from alluser
GROUP BY event_id,platform


select
 extended_fields['ssr'] as ssr,
  event_id,
 b_parse_ua(ua,'osName') as platform,
  count(1) as pv,
  count(DISTINCT CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))) as uv
from
  b_dwd.dwd_flow_ubt_web_main_event_l_hr
where
  log_date = '20230828'
--   and log_hour in ("20","21","22","23","24")
  and event_id in ("333.1121.shouye.show","333.1121.erchuangvideo.show","333.1121.erchuangvideo.click","333.1121.music_comment.show","333.1121.music_comment.click","333.1121.share.show","333.1121.share.click","333.1121.yuanban.show","333.1121.yuanban.click")
  and extended_fields['ssr'] in ("1","2")
  and extended_fields['postion'] in ("1","2")
GROUP BY event_id,b_parse_ua(ua,'osName'),extended_fields['ssr']



with tmp as (
  select
    extended_fields ['ssr'] as ssr,
   b_parse_ua(ua,'osName') as ua,
    event_id,
    buvid,
    extended_fields,
    mid
  from
    b_dwd.dwd_flow_ubt_web_main_event_l_hr
  where
    log_date = '20230828'
    and event_id in (
      "333.1121.shouye.show",
      "333.1121.erchuangvideo.show",
      "333.1121.erchuangvideo.click",
      "333.1121.music_comment.show",
      "333.1121.music_comment.click",
      "333.1121.share.show",
      "333.1121.share.click",
      "333.1121.yuanban.show",
      "333.1121.yuanban.click",
      "333.1121.recommondStart.show"
    )
    and extended_fields ['ssr'] in ("1", "2")
    and b_parse_ua(ua,'osName') in ("iOS","Android")
)
SELECT
  *,
  music_comment_click_pv / music_comment_show_pv as music_comment_pv_ctr,
  music_comment_click_uv / music_comment_show_uv as music_comment_uv_ctr,
  erchuangvideo_click_pv / erchuangvideo_show_pv as erchuangvideo_pv_ctr,
  erchuangvideo_click_uv / erchuangvideo_show_uv as erchuangvideo_uv_ctr,
  share_click_pv /  share_show_pv as share_pv_ctr,
  share_click_uv /  share_show_uv as share_uv_ctr,
  yuanban_click_pv /  yuanban_show_pv as yuanban_pv_ctr,
  yuanban_click_uv /  yuanban_show_uv as yuanban_uv_ctr
from
  (
    SELECT
      ssr,
     ua,
    COUNT(
        CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.shouye.show' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS showye_show_pv,
      COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.shouye.show' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS showye_show_uv,
      COUNT(
        CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.erchuangvideo.show' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS erchuangvideo_show_pv,
      COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.erchuangvideo.show' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS erchuangvideo_show_uv,
      COUNT(
        CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.erchuangvideo.click' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS erchuangvideo_click_pv,
      COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.erchuangvideo.click' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS erchuangvideo_click_uv,
      COUNT(
        CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.music_comment.show' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS music_comment_show_pv,
      COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.music_comment.show' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS music_comment_show_uv,
      COUNT(
        CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.music_comment.click' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS music_comment_click_pv,
      COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.music_comment.click' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS music_comment_click_uv,
    COUNT(
        CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.share.show' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS share_show_pv,
      COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.share.show' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS share_show_uv,
      COUNT(
        CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.share.click' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS share_click_pv,
      COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.share.click' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS share_click_uv,
     COUNT(
        CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.yuanban.show' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS yuanban_show_pv,
      COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.yuanban.show' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS yuanban_show_uv,
      COUNT(
        CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.yuanban.click' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS yuanban_click_pv,
      COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.yuanban.click' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS yuanban_click_uv,
     COUNT(
        CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.recommondStart.show' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS recommondStart_show_pv,
      COUNT(
        DISTINCT CASE
          WHEN event_id = '333.1121.recommondStart.show' THEN CONCAT(coalesce(buvid,'a'),coalesce(mid,1), coalesce(extended_fields['buvid'],'a'))
          ELSE NULL
        END
      ) AS recommondStart_show_uv
    from
      tmp
    GROUP BY
      ssr,ua
  )t

with abTest as (
  select
    get_json_object(
      extended_fields ['abtest'],
      '$.music_list_artist'
    ) as abtest,
    buvid,
    log_date,
    event_id
  from
    b_dwd.dwd_flow_ubt_web_main_event_l_hr
  where
    log_date = '20240630'
    and event_id IN (
      '333.1121.shouyeab.show'
    )
)
SELECT
  abtest,
  count(buvid) as pv,
  count(DISTINCT buvid) as uv,
  log_date,
  event_id
from
  abTest
GROUP BY
  abtest,
  log_date,
  event_id

更新

update users set email='123' where
is_deleted=0 and username='456s'

删除

update users set is_deleted=1 where is_deleted=0 and
username='456s'

04数据类型

  • INT 4字节 (-2 147 483 648，2 147 483 647) 常⻅整数存储
  • DOUBLE 8字节 存储浮点数（通常要尽量避免）
  • VARCHAR 0-65535 字节 实际使⽤⼀般到20000最 多了 存储字符串（通常不⽤TEXT， ⽽是varchar）
  • DATETIME 8字节 存储⽇期

在互联⽹服务端中，我们通常不会完全按照mysql拥有的数据类型来使⽤。⼀般的操作惯例 是：

  1. 主键ID通常unsigned int，如果记录会⽐较多，选bigint
  2. 枚举类型不使⽤enum类型，使⽤tinyint，并且在程序中⾃⾏控制取值
  3. 不使⽤布尔类型，⽽是⽤tinyint(1)，（有些历史因素）
  4. ⼀般不会直接删除数据，⽽是创建is_deleted来标记删除，这样数据就不会因为误操作 ⽽消失，⾄少还找得回来
  5. ⼀般不⽤TEXT，查询性能⽐较差。⽤varchar代替，或者过⻓的话存到boss⾥，数据库 只存放链接
  6. 需要有ctime和mtime字段来存储记录创建和修改⽇期，这个是公司规范要求的。类型是 datetime
  7. ⼀般浮点数，如果能⽤整数来表示尽可能⽤整数，尤其是涉及钱的地⽅。⽐如⾦额⼀般 以分为单位存储，因此100元在数据库⾥的存储就是10000。这样主要是为了减少浮点误差

05使用ORM操作数据库 Prisma接入

实际就是对数据库操作的一种映射

npm install prisma --save-dev

初始化：

npx prisma init --datasource-provider mysql

需要安装mysql

采用docker-compose 多镜像部署，docker相关知识可以查看往期文章

docker-conpose.yaml内容：

services:
  mysql:
    image: mariadb:10.6
    ports:
      - 3307:3306
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: password
      MYSQL_DATABASE: test-db
    volumes:
      - ./db:/var/lib/mysql
  redis:
    image: redis:6
    restart: always
    container_name: test-redis
    ports:
      - 6380:6379
  phpmyadmin:
    image: phpmyadmin
    restart: always
    depends_on:
      - mysql
    ports:
      - '8245:80'
    environment:
      PMA_HOST: mysql
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: password

.env中添加

DATABASE_URL="mysql://root:password@localhost:3307/test-db"

执行：docker

docker-compose rm -s -f -v && docker-compose up -d

schema.prisma⽂件，添加你的第⼀个模型

generator client {
provider = "prisma-client-js"
}
datasource db {
provider = "mysql"
url = env("DATABASE_URL")
}
/// ⽤户表
model biliUser {
id Int @id @default(autoincrement())
/// ⽤户名
username String @default("")
/// nickname
nickname String @default("")
/// 头像 url avatarUrl String @default("")
@map("avatar_url")
ctime DateTime @default(now())
mtime DateTime @default(now()) @updatedAt
isDeleted Boolean @default(false) @map("is_deleted")
@@unique([username])
@@index([mtime(sort: Desc)])
@@map("bili_user")
}

有了schema需要让现有的数据库有相关的表，⾃动检查前后两次的schema变化，并且⽣成修改的SQL：

pnpm exec prisma migrate dev

得到prisma/migrations/20240813104748_add_user/migration.sql

像是一条时间线 记录改动数据库

在docker中打开下图链接 跳转web页操作 查询数据库

账号：root 密码：docker里设定的
